meta.name: Cohort Churn Detector
meta.description: Identify which user cohorts (by signup month or segment) are churning fastest. Flag at-risk cohorts and email a ranked churn analysis.

parameters.content:
## 24 — Cohort Churn Detector

**Required:**
- COHORT_SHEET_ID: sheet with columns: cohort_month, active_at_30d, active_at_60d, active_at_90d, churned_30d, churned_60d, churned_90d, size, segment
- NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO
- CHURN_ALERT_THRESHOLD: churn % that triggers at-risk flag (default: 20)

**Schedule:** Last day of each month at 08:00
**Status:** Beta.

parameters.subject: 📉 Cohort Churn {{ $json.date }}: {{ $json.at_risk_count }} cohorts at risk (>{{ $json.threshold_pct }}%)
